1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
ORDER BY gyldigfra DESC
LIMIT 1;

1.description: resolve Kristiansand municipality and get geometry

2.description: get buildings in the municipality (filter by kommunenummer from step 1)

4.description: reduce storm-flood polygons to the municipality extent (kommune omrade intersects stormflo omrade)

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year storm-flood polygons

6.description: count distinct buildings affected by storm-flood (one row per count)

7.description: deterministic ordering of the aggregate result

8.description: limit to the single aggregate result

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
ORDER BY gyldigfra DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='4204'));

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
ORDER BY gyldigfra DESC
LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in the municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting municipality extent

4.description: find buildings that intersect storm-flood polygons

5.description: count distinct buildings that intersect storm-flood polygons
